bug_description: transitions.py guards run AFTER state change instead of BEFORE, so invalid transitions are applied then rejected, leaving machine in wrong state
root_cause: transitions.py execute_transition() calls machine._set_state_internal(to_state) BEFORE checking the guard
symptom: machine.py reports correct state but internal state may be corrupted after failed guard check
fix_location: src/transitions.py execute_transition() - check guard BEFORE calling _set_state_internal()
verification: check.sh returns 1 when run, confirming tests fail due to transition order bug
